title: OmniEconomy
description: Currency & Economy. Integrates with create, but runs fine without it!
body:
# OmniEconomy

![OmniEconomy Items & Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc5e80921827ef05dfc1ad4bd94445dd2f47563c.png)

⚠️ This mod is still early in development

Official: https://omnieconomy.xyz/

Wiki: https://wiki.omnieconomy.xyz/

A comprehensive economy mod for Minecraft that adds a complete monetary system with physical currency, banking, player rewards, and extensive customization options.

## What This Mod Does
OmniEconomy transforms your Minecraft server into a fully-functioning economy with:

- Physical Currency System: Eight denominations of bills ($1, $5, $10, $20, $50, $100, $500, $1000) that players can carry, trade, and store
- ATM Blocks: Functional banking machines where players can deposit bills from their inventory or withdraw specific amounts in various denominations
- Player Commands: Check balances, transfer money between players, view leaderboards, and claim daily rewards
- Automated Rewards: Optional playtime rewards that pay players for active gameplay, with configurable AFK detection
- Mob Drop Currency: Mobs can drop money when killed, with configurable drop rates and daily limits to prevent grinding
- Lottery System: Server-wide lottery events where players can pool money for a chance to win big
- Capitalist Greed Enchantment: A unique weapon enchantment (3 levels) that increases currency drop rates from mobs
- Create Mod Integration: Bank card item that enables automatic bill withdrawal when using Create's Stock Ticker shopping lists

## Why Download This Mod
### For Server Owners:

- Add depth to your server economy without complex plugins
- Highly configurable - enable/disable any feature and adjust all rates and limits
- Includes admin commands for economy management
- Automatic backups of economy data
- Optional anonymous telemetry to help with development

### For Players:

- Earn money through gameplay (mob killing, daily logins, playtime)
- Trade currency items directly with other players
- Use ATMs with an intuitive keyboard-navigable interface
- Participate in server-wide lottery events
- Craft ATM blocks and bank cards for convenience

## First-Time Setup:

- Configuration file generates on first launch at config/omnieconomy-common.toml
- All features are configurable including currency symbol, command cooldowns, reward amounts, and drop rates
- Economy data saves to world/data/omnieconomy.dat with optional rolling backups

### Key Features You Can Configure:

- Enable/disable any command or reward system
- Set maximum player balance limits
- Adjust mob drop chances and daily earning caps
- Configure lottery settings and playtime reward intervals
- Set command cooldowns to prevent spam

## Default Commands:

- `/money` - Check your balance
- `/pay <player> <amount>` - Send money to another player
- `/baltop` - View the richest players
- `/daily` - Claim daily reward
- `/lottery` - Create or join lottery events
- `/deposit` - Deposit all bills from inventory into your account
- `/withdraw <amount>` - Withdraw money as optimized bills
- `/omniecon help` - View all available commands

## Admin Commands:

- `/omniecon admin give/take/set` - Manage player balances
- `/omniecon admin balance` - Check any player's balance
- `/omniecon admin resetdaily/resetplaytime` - Reset player cooldowns

## Crafting Recipes:

- Bills: Not craftable. Obtainable through rewards (or creative menu)
- Circuit Board: Copper, Gold, Redstone, and Iron
- Keypad: Stone Buttons and Iron
- ATM Block: Iron Blocks, Circuit Boards, Chest, and Keypad
- Bank Card: Papers, Ink Sac

Economy data persists across server restarts and can be backed up automatically. All features respect the configured maximum balance limits to prevent overflow issues.
